| `01-registration-case-list.png` | Case list with search, status badges, identity column |

| `05-home-dashboard.png` | Home page with four core decisions |
| `06-full-case-with-permit-and-documents.png` | Non-EU worker — permit, edit buttons, checklist |
| `07-document-upload-and-attached-files.png` | Immigration decision, upload, attached files + remove |
